sections.html:
​

Inspection Checklist

Inspection Frequency: Refer to 29 CFR 1910.178 Powered Industrial Trucks and WAC 296-863 Powered Industrial Trucks for specific requirements.

Item #

Inspection Item

Pass

Fail

N/A

1

Fluid levels (oil, water, hydraulic) are adequate (per 29 CFR 1910.178(q)(7))
